name: budget_add_entry
description: Add a new income or expense entry to the budget.
description_for_agent: Add a budget entry (income or expense). Required: type ('income' or 'expense'), name (description), amount (number). Optional: category, is_recurring (bool, default true), is_paid (bool, default false), month_key (YYYY-MM, defaults to current month). Use when user wants to add income, salary, expense, bill, or any financial entry.

month_key.description: Month in YYYY-MM format (defaults to current month)
